title: Crispy Festive Gooey Indian Cauliflower Fritters-inspired Samosas
description: A twist on traditional Indian samosas, featuring gooey fregola and a sweet glaze, perfect for a festive gathering.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the whole wheat flour, ghee, and vegetable shortening, and mix until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5-7 minutes until smooth and pliable.
Divide the dough into 8-10 equal portions.
Roll out each portion into a thin circle.
Place a tablespoon of fregola mixture in the center of each circle.
Brush the edges with a little water and fold the dough over to form a triangle.
Seal the edges by pressing them with a fork.
Brush the tops with a little ghee and bake for 15-20 minutes or until golden brown.
While the samosas are baking, heat the green chutney and honey in a small saucepan over medium heat.
Once the samosas are done, brush them with the glaze and garnish with cilantro and sesame seeds.
Serve hot with a side of raita or chutney.
